zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Kingston於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親William Kingston50歲，母親Mary Scrope50歲。他於1542年與Lady Eleanor Kingston在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年6月4日在英國英格蘭享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Kingston于大约1525年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲William Kingston50岁，母亲Mary Scrope50岁。他于1542年与Lady Eleanor Kingston在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年6月4日在英国英格兰享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Kingston was born about 1525, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Kingston, was 50 and his mother, Mary Scrope, was 50. He married Lady Eleanor Kingston in 1542, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 June 1599, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Kingston(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kingston(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Scrope(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1542년 영국에서 Lady Eleanor Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 6월 4일 영국 잉글랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.
